productDisplayName: Baggit Women Samson Cobra Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cm Crafted from genuine leatherette has a flap style opening with a magnetic button closure Metal ring and rivet detail on the flap with contrasting inners Six card holders, three compartments and one zippered separator in the main compartment Six card holders and a pocket on the inner side of the flap A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
